name: bigdft-dev
description: Developer guides for BigDFT's Fortran libraries and internals: Futile, ATlab, liborbs, PSolver, KB projectors, and the input-variable pipeline. Use when writing or modifying BigDFT source code.

interface.shortDescription: Fortran developer guides for BigDFT's internal libraries.
interface.longDescription: Developer guides for contributing to BigDFT's Fortran source: the Futile utility library, ATlab geometry/grid library, liborbs orbital library, PSolver Poisson solver, Kleinman-Bylander pseudopotential projectors, and the pipeline for adding or modifying input variables.
defaultPrompt: Add a new input variable to BigDFT.
Explain how PSolver handles boundary conditions.
